narrative:
Washington Township has 1,375 registered voters, with 50.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.4 percentage points.
